notes: v1.5.5 — Guard you can rely on. A timed pause now runs its full length and releases instead of silently re-locking, and a timed Disconnect auto-reconnects your broker the moment it ends. Guard acts the instant you cross a limit (the old activation 'grace' delay is gone) and no longer double-fires when a value just hovers at your threshold. NEW Hard limits: a real ceiling Guard physically enforces — cap contracts and block entry order types; a market order that slips over is trimmed straight back, and exits are never blocked. NEW per-account stats: split your Intel, Patterns and Debrief by account. Fixed: Guard could show as locked for active subscribers (now resolved by your subscription, not a fixed plan list); Settings could crash on open; Display & privacy contrast. Acknowledge rules block new entries by default, and alerts are tidier — one clear message per event. Closing or reducing a position is never blocked.
